stories.title: Elly De La Cruz's Historic 5-Tool Emergence — Leading All MLB Shortstops in WAR

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Elly De La Cruz leads all MLB shortstops in WAR this season. He's 24, slashing .265/.337/.510 with 10 HR and 8 stolen bases — and was the first SS since 1900 to reach 5 HR + 5 SB in 16 games. Sunday: 3 hits, 2 runs scored in a 5-0 Reds win. The emergence is real. #Reds

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: The case for Elly De La Cruz as the NL's best shortstop: 10 HR, 8 SB, 94.4 mph avg exit velocity, 1.9 WAR (leads all SS). He's ahead of Bobby Witt Jr. in WAR. At 24, he may not have peaked yet. #Reds #MLB

article.headline: Elly De La Cruz Is Becoming a 5-Tool Force — Leading All MLB Shortstops in WAR in 2026

stories.title: Braves Win 6th Straight, Lead NL East at 28-13 — Elder Strikes Out Six, Olson Three RBI

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text: The Braves just won their 6th in a row. Bryce Elder: 6 K in 6.2 IP. Matt Olson: 3 RBI. Atlanta is now 28-13 — the best record in the NL. They're not slowing down. #Braves #MLB

stories.title: Munetaka Murakami's Record-Breaking HR Season Continues — 15 HRs in 40 Games

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Munetaka Murakami has 15 home runs in his first 40 MLB games. He set the record for most career HRs before hitting a first double or triple. He's hit HRs in the first game of multiple consecutive series. The White Sox signed him for $34M. They got a bargain. #WhiteSox #MLB

stories.title: José Ramírez Has 300 Stolen Bases — Now 9 HRs From Joining 300-300 Club

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: José Ramírez now has 300 career stolen bases — only the 2nd player in Cleveland history to do it (after Kenny Lofton). He also has 291 career home runs. Nine more HRs and he joins Willie Mays, Barry Bonds, and Alex Rodriguez in the 300-300 club. #Guardians #MLB

stories.title: Andrew Abbott Shuts Out Astros 5-0 — Reds End 8-Game Skid, Win Houston Series

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Andrew Abbott: 6 IP, 3 H, 5 K, 1 BB. The Reds shut out the Astros 5-0 Sunday, ending an 8-game losing streak. Three perfect innings to close from the bullpen. Elly De La Cruz went 3-for-3. Spencer Steer homered. Cincinnati is back in business. #Reds #MLB

stories.title: MLB Monday Check-In — Power Rankings, Standings Snapshot, Week Ahead

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text: Monday MLB snapshot: Braves 28-13 (NL East, 6-game streak). Cubs 27-13 (NL Central, first team since 1935 with two 10-game win streaks in one season). AL remains historically tight. It's the NL's world right now. #MLB
